title: Contraceptive and HRT from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the contraceptive and HRT section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of use of contraceptives and HRT.

StudyID.description: Unique 6-digit identifier for each participant in the study.

R0_ContracepPillUse.x-question: Have you ever used the contraceptive pill?

R0_ContracepPill_Name.x-question: please give the name of the contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_Unknown.x-question: cannot remember the name of the contraceptive pill
R0_ContracepPill_Unknown.description: Participant's inability to recall pill name

R0_ContracepPill_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StartAge.description: Age when participant began this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StopAge.description: Age when participant discontinued this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this pill

ContracepPillExtra.description: Additional timing details for contraceptive pills 4-9

R0_ContracepPill_StartMnth.x-question: At what month did you start using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StartMnth.description: Month participant began this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_StartYr.x-question: At what year did you start using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StartYr.description: Year participant began this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_StopMnth.x-question: At what month did you stop using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StopMnth.description: Month participant discontinued this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_StopYr.x-question: At what year did you stop using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StopYr.description: Year participant discontinued this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanThree.x-question: More than 3 episodes of contraceptive pill
R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanThree.description: Participant's indication of multiple contraceptive pill uses

R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanNine.x-question: More than 9 episodes of contraceptive pills
R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanNine.description: Participant's indication of extensive contraceptive pill use

R0_OtherHormonalContracep.x-question: Have you ever used any other type of hormonal contraception, such as contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch?
R0_OtherHormonalContracep.description: Participant's use of non-pill contraceptive methods

OtherContracep.description: Non-pill contraceptive methods used by participant

R0_OtherContracep_Name.x-question: please give the name of the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)
R0_OtherContracep_Name.description: Name of non-pill contraceptive method used

R0_OtherContracep_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StartAge.description: Age participant began this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StopAge.description: Age participant discontinued this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this method

R0_OtherContracep_StartMnth.x-question: At what month did you start using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StartMnth.description: Month participant began this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_StartYr.x-question: At what year did you start using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StartYr.description: Year participant began this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_StopMnth.x-question: At what month did you stop using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StopMnth.description: Month participant discontinued this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_StopYr.x-question: At what year did you stop using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StopYr.description: Year participant discontinued this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_MoreThanTwo.x-question: More than 2 episodes of contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)
R0_OtherContracep_MoreThanTwo.description: Participant's indication of multiple contraceptive method uses

R0_HRT_Use.x-question: Have you ever had hormone replacement therapy (HRT)?

R0_HRT_Name.x-question: please give the name of the Hormone preparation
R0_HRT_Name.description: Name of HRT preparation used by participant

R0_HRT_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the Hormone preparation?
R0_HRT_StartAge.description: Age participant began this HRT preparation

R0_HRT_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the Hormone preparation?
R0_HRT_StopAge.description: Age participant discontinued this HRT preparation

R0_HRT_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the Hormone preparation?
R0_HRT_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this HRT

HRTExtra.description: Additional timing details for HRT preparations 4-8

R0_HRT_StopYr.description: Year participant discontinued this HRT preparation

R0_HRT_MoreThanThree.description: Participant's indication of multiple HRT preparations

R0_HRT_MoreThanEight.x-question: More than 8 episodes of Hormone Preparation
R0_HRT_MoreThanEight.description: Participant's indication of extensive HRT use

R0_HRT_HrmnLevelsChecked.x-question: When being considered for HRT, did a doctor measure your hormone levels?

R0_OtherSexHrmnUse.x-question: Have you ever used any other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation (e.g., for osteoporosis, heart disease, pre-menopausal symptoms)?
R0_OtherSexHrmnUse.description: Participant's use of non-HRT sex hormones

R0_OtherSexHrmn_Name.x-question: please give the name of the other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation

R0_OtherSexHrmn_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation?
R0_OtherSexHrmn_StartAge.description: Age participant began this hormone treatment

R0_OtherSexHrmn_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation?
R0_OtherSexHrmn_StopAge.description: Age participant discontinued this hormone treatment

R0_OtherSexHrmn_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation?
R0_OtherSexHrmn_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this hormone treatment

OtherSexHrmnExtra.description: Additional timing details for hormone treatments 3-7

R0_OtherSexHrmn_StartMnth.x-question: At what month did you start using other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation?
R0_OtherSexHrmn_StartMnth.description: Month participant began this hormone treatment

R0_OtherSexHrmn_StartYr.x-question: At what year did you start using the other type of sex hormone treatment or preparation?
